title: kernel/voteの開発状況を調べて、残タスクを教えて
summary_text: - **Blocker 1: trust gate prevents autonomous integrated review generation.** Both canary issues show `Author trust check failed (permission: none). Hand-off to humans required.` (`#483`: https://github.com/cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator/issues/483#issuecomment-4046442600, `#484`: https://github.com/cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator/issues/484#issuecomment-4046443383). With no integrated review payload, canary cannot resolve orchestrators. - **Blocker 2: `run-canary.sh` hard-fails when integrated review is missing.** Canary explicitly waits for integrated review in [`run-canary.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/run-canary.sh#L518), then fails cases with `reason=timeout-no-integrated-review` at [`run-canary.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/run-canary.sh#L777), [`run-canary.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/run-canary.sh#L830), [`run-canary.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/run-canary.sh#L889), and exits non-zero at [`run-canary.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/run-canary.sh#L895). This matches run `23002290249` (`Run canary (mode-aware)` failed). - **Blocker 3: gate workflow makes that canary failure blocking for PR/push.** `canary-lite` triggers canary and watches it with `--exit-status` in [`fugue-orchestration-gate.yml`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L219); therefore dispatched canary failure propagates directly to run `23002274267` (`Trigger canary lite` failed). (Log confirms watched run was `23002290249`.) Posted investigation comments: - `#483`: https://github.com/cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator/issues/483#issuecomment-4046501560 - `#484`: https://github.com/cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator/issues/484#issuecomment-4046501625
